title: Claim & the lease
meta: To claim a job is to run the @claim script: ZPOPMIN the oldest pending id, HINCRBY attempts, HSET state active, ZADD it to the active set at now + lease. The active-set score IS the lease deadline; attempts IS the fencing token. Real EchoMQ.Jobs code in two beats — the claim/3 handle and the decoded Lua — with a lease-and-token inspector.
